name: Pecan-Cornbread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the bread, water, and soy sauce together until all water is absorbed.
2. Melt the butter and add it to the mixture.
3. Blend in the pecans, onions, oysters, garlic, pepper, salt, sage, and rice.
4. Place the mixture into a large casserole dish.
5. Bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes at 350°F (or use most of this stuffing to stuff a large turkey).
